topic: Why 80% of people are magnesium deficient and don't know it
caption:
Did you know 80% of us are silently deficient in this crucial mineral? 🤯 Magnesium is involved in over 300 enzymatic reactions, from energy production to nerve function, yet modern life is actively depleting our stores. From nutrient-depleted soils to chronic stress and processed foods, the odds are stacked against us. This silent deficiency often manifests as muscle twitches, fatigue, anxiety, or poor sleep – symptoms easily dismissed or misdiagnosed. Understanding its importance is the first step to recoding your health. Swipe to uncover why you're likely deficient and how to fix it! 💪

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you.
